headline: All You Need to Know About Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) Rating Upgrade to Buy
summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).
